name: Marvel Spider-Man Mask Kids' Decorative Throw Pillow - The Marvel Collection by Pillowfort™
description: This Marvel Spider-Man Mask Kids' Decorative Throw Pillow from The Marvel Collection by Pillowfort™ makes a great gift for your young Spidey fan. Made from recycled polyester microfiber fabric with recycled PET filling, this figural throw pillow is designed as Spider-Man's face mask for a fan-favorite look. Great for pairing with other Marvel-themed blankets, sheets and pillows, it features sewn-seam closures for a neat finish.
